metaDescription: Interactive models and analyzers for understanding systemic change.

impactDashboard.metaDescription: Model the conditions that raise or lower the chance of positive social impact.
impactDashboard.clientDescription: Adjust the sliders to model your system's potential for positive change. The model evaluates Core Capacities, Structural Multipliers, Psycho-Social dynamics, Narrative coherence, and Emergence factors against negative forces.
impactDashboard.strengthDescription: This is a strong area. Use it to support weaker areas.
impactDashboard.bottleneckDescription: This bottleneck needs attention. Focus here could improve the whole system.

preMeetingAudit.metaDescription: Plan and evaluate events with clear goals, care, and systemic awareness.
preMeetingAudit.title: Pre-meeting audit tool

participationIndex.metaDescription: Measure the real level of citizen participation and distinguish genuine inclusion from public relations theater.

valueCompass.metaDescription: Identify and balance your core values to navigate life with purpose.

principles.metaDescription: Explore 200+ timeless principles for building sustainable and harmonious human communities.

innerHelpers.metaDescription: Deep-dive tools to identify and resolve internal blockages and cognitive patterns.

externalNotice.summary: This tool is served inside an embedded page. Most frontend assets are now self-hosted, but some tools may still connect to external services or open third-party links.
externalNotice.ipDisclosure: If a tool connects to an external service, your IP address may become visible to that service.
externalNotice.refererDisclosure: Your browser may also send the current page as a Referer when those external requests occur.
externalNotice.domains: Current third-party connections depend on the specific tool, and are narrower than the earlier CDN-based setup.
externalNotice.remember: Your choice is remembered for this tool during the current browser session.

draw.metaDescription: A fully local Excalidraw whiteboard embedded directly in Changemappers.
draw.title: Local Whiteboard
draw.description: Sketch, map, and export diagrams directly in the app with a fully local Excalidraw workspace.
draw.localOnly: Runs inside Changemappers with self-hosted assets and no iframe dependency.
draw.autosave: Your scene autosaves in this browser so you can return to unfinished work.
draw.exportHint: Use Excalidraw's built-in export menu for PNG, SVG, or .excalidraw files.
draw.helpIntro: Sketch, map, and export diagrams directly in the app with a fully local Excalidraw workspace.
draw.helpSelfHosted: Runs inside Changemappers with self-hosted assets and no iframe dependency.
draw.helpAutosave: Your scene autosaves in this browser so you can return to unfinished work.
draw.helpExport: Use Excalidraw's built-in export menu for PNG, SVG, or .excalidraw files.
draw.helpLimitations: This whiteboard keeps one local scene in your browser. For multiple saved diagrams, switching between them, visibility settings, or shareable team workflows, use Canvas instead.

openPlatform.metaDescription: Compare regenerative platforms, civic networks, and collective intelligence tools.
openPlatform.title: Regenerative Portals Analyzer
openPlatform.subtitle: Compare open-source platforms, networks, and collective intelligence systems in the Game B ecosystem.

portals.name: Changemappers
portals.description: Archetype complementarity matching, regenerative peer support, and RDG-oriented coordination for changemakers.

portals.name: Hylo
portals.description: Community-led coordination platform for bioregional organizing, regenerative agriculture, and resilience.

portals.name: CoDo / Kamooni
portals.description: Open-source civic engagement system with altruistic wallet mechanics and liquid democracy.

portals.name: OpenCivics
portals.description: Decentralized solidarity network focused on institutional bridging and systemic grant-making.

portals.name: Decidim
portals.description: Open-source platform for participatory democracy, assemblies, proposals, debates, and votes.

portals.name: Polis
portals.description: Conversation platform that uses real-time analysis to surface consensus and divisions.

portals.name: Terraso
portals.description: GIS mapping platform for landscape partnerships and ecological restoration.

portals.name: SEEDS / Hypha DHO
portals.description: Blockchain-based financial ecosystem using tokenomics and incentives for regeneration.
